title: Gemini Menu Extraction Output Schema
description: Strict JSON schema for Gemini structured output during menu extraction. Used in Phase 1 Production Release of the MyGenie AI Menu Import System. Every Gemini response MUST conform; responses that fail validation trigger retry per the playbook's §7.2 retry rules.
$comment: Version string stored in menu_import_pages.raw_extraction_payload + menu_imports.json_schema_version. Bumping requires a new prompt version + eval rerun against the frozen golden set.

import_id.description: Our server-side menu_import_id, echoed back so we can bind the payload to the staging record.

source_file.description: Original file name preserved for audit; never used as a trust signal.

model_name.description: Exact Gemini model string used for this extraction.

json_schema_version.description: Schema version this response conforms to.

warnings.description: Extraction-level (page/document) warnings. Row-level warnings are on individual rows.

page_number.description: 1-based page number within the source file.

rows.description: Zero rows is valid only if 'empty_page' is in extraction_summary/warnings.

menu_notes.description: Page-level notes (GST extra, parcel charge, etc.). Never auto-applied.

row_no.description: 1-based sequence within the page, in reading order.

category.description: Category heading as visible on the page; use 'Uncategorized' if no heading grounds this row.

item_name.description: Exact menu item name. Do not reword. No invention.

rate.description: Decimal price as a number. Null when missing or ambiguous (set variant_warning or missing_price accordingly via issue_status/warnings).

currency.description: Default INR unless other currency is visible on the page.

raw_text.description: Verbatim text from the source page that grounds this row. REQUIRED. Rows without non-empty raw_text are rejected.

confidence.description: Self-reported confidence. Rows with 'low' are auto-marked review_required server-side.

issue_status.description: clean = passes all checks; review_required = blocking warning or low confidence; flagged_only_phase1 = variant/addon/tax-note pattern detected but not extracted in Phase 1.

source_grounded.description: True iff raw_text is non-empty AND the row can be tied to a specific region on the page.

source_bbox.description: Bounding box on the page image (in pixels if image, in PDF points if text PDF). Null is allowed but discouraged; the UI source-crop pane requires it when present.

variant_warning.description: True when multiple prices appear near one item (Small/Medium/Large, Half/Full). Phase 1 DOES NOT extract variant children; only flags.

addon_warning.description: True when add-on phrasing is detected (+ Cheese, Extra Patty). Phase 1 DOES NOT extract addon children; only flags.

tax_note_warning.description: True when tax/GST/service/packaging phrasing is attached to the row itself (rare; usually in menu_notes).

notes.description: Short free-text model notes about this row. May be empty string.

allOf.$comment: If variant_warning=true, rate must be null AND issue_status must be flagged_only_phase1 (Phase 1 does not extract variant children).
If addon_warning=true, issue_status must be flagged_only_phase1.
If confidence=low, issue_status must be review_required or flagged_only_phase1.

tax_note_warning.description: True for note_type in {tax_note, service_charge_note, packaging_note}. Never auto-applied; user must review.

out_of_scope_in_phase_1: variant child extraction (only variant_warning flag in Phase 1)
addon child extraction (only addon_warning flag in Phase 1)
food_type classification in the Gemini output (normalized post-hoc)
pricing_type classification in the Gemini output (inferred post-hoc)
enforcement_notes: additionalProperties=false everywhere to block hallucinated fields.
raw_text is required + non-empty on every row; primary hallucination defense.
Conditional allOf blocks enforce that variant/addon flags imply the correct issue_status + null rate.
model_name enum narrows to the approved set; unknown models fail validation.
